Pundit tips Liverpool to sign Premier League centre-back who has impressed this season
arts.sum: Liverpool had a quiet summer transfer window with only two players joining the club. One of them, goalkeeper Giorgi Mamardashvili, will spend time away from the club on loan while the other one, Federico Chiesa, has joined instantly.
